title: Surgeon Vacancy at Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions:
Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions!
